aliases: Communist Party of Peru – Shining Path
Partido Comunista del Perú – Sendero Luminoso
description: Far-left political party and guerrilla group in Peru, founded in 1969 by Abimael Guzmán. It launched a 'people's war' in 1980 aiming to overthrow the government and establish a New Democracy through guerrilla warfare. The group is designated as a terrorist organization by Peru, the US, EU, Japan, and Canada. Since the capture of its leaders in the 1990s and 2012, its activity has declined, with remaining factions operating in the VRAEM region.
